**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

CSSC Saisiyi (Wuxi) Electrical Technology Co., Ltd. (branded as CSSC-SETH) is a strategic high-tech subsidiary of the China State Shipbuilding Corporation (CSSC). Originally established in Beijing and relocated to Wuxi's New Wu District, the company serves as a core entity for marine power and propulsion innovation. It specializes in developing advanced power electronic devices, marine electric propulsion systems, and hybrid power solutions aimed at decarbonizing the shipping industry. Backed by a paid-in capital of over 85M RMB, it operates at the intersection of heavy industry and clean energy technology.
